title: Reverse Linked List
prompt: Given the head of a singly linked list, reverse the list and return the new head.
constraints: The number of nodes is in range [0, 5000].
hints: Use three pointers: prev, cur, next.
Flip cur.next to prev each step, then advance.
A recursive solution exists in O(n) time and O(n) call-stack space.
pitfalls: Forgetting to save next before overwriting cur.next.
Returning the original head instead of prev.
